title: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6
display_title: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6
wikitext:
[]: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Tlalac » Tue Jul 06, 2021 4:59 am Hello everyone ! As said on the post by UrsusArctos : [...]the first 18 minutes and 43 seconds of Shin Eva screen on the Khara YouTube[...] How much longer is that portion compared to what was screened last time ? I just really hope someone is able to record it and ditribute this because the post ends with this information : "The website announces that there are no plans on archiving the event and requests viewers to watch it live. "

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by rilocay » Tue Jul 06, 2021 8:34 am The length should be about the same, but the sequence will probably the 1.01 version which has some slight angle changes and updated fx. It should also have a "previously on evangelion" intro which has too seen some (blink and you'll miss it) updated cuts in 1.01. If you have a VPN, Amazon Prime Japan still had the original 1.0 version up as of a week ago, but may have changed since.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jul 06, 2021 9:08 am Tlalac wrote: As said on the post by UrsusArctos : [...]the first 18 minutes and 43 seconds of Shin Eva screen on the Khara YouTube[...]

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by hui43210 » Tue Jul 06, 2021 9:18 am UrsusArctos wrote: Tlalac#926014 wrote: As said on the post by UrsusArctos : [...]the first 18 minutes and 43 seconds of Shin Eva screen on the Khara YouTube[...]

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Tue Jul 06, 2021 9:22 am Yes, in the Prime Video the length is 12minutes and 37 seconds: https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/B08XQG9V6T

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jul 06, 2021 9:59 am Ahhh I missed it. Some screenshots have shown up like Rei squatting in front of that dog with a neck brace, like from that one Nirvana music video

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Mr. M » Tue Jul 06, 2021 10:40 am Someone recorded these new 6 minutes?

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jul 06, 2021 9:23 pm Oh, I'm sure many people recorded the extra six minutes... but don't ask for the links or share them here - that's illegal.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Tlalac » Tue Jul 06, 2021 11:10 pm I have watched it Live on my phone (1PM in Belgium at that time) hidden behind my desk at work :p Amazing additions and FX it feels like if they're not present, maybe it s the hype of 13th Of August that s in my mind producing serotonin + the extra 6 minutes are totally worth it ! (Tôji, Kensuke and Hikari Horaki !) yes there you can find this at the usual cat site but in a poorer image quality but decent anyway i won't post link and respect the rules

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jul 07, 2021 3:05 am It occurs to me that all the people who stayed away from spoilers are only now finding out that the classmates are alive. I saw someone gushing about it on tumblr.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jul 07, 2021 10:09 am UrsusArctos wrote: How embarrassing, I made a mistake in the editing! Sorry!

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Jul 07, 2021 10:51 am The Shin Eva height chart leak spoiled the fact that they were alive. As far as spoilers go, that was expected, if not highly anticipated!

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jul 07, 2021 11:57 am That's one of the reasons why I don't know how some people managed to stay away from this information for so long. I saw so many people surprised by them yesterday. Kensuke, in particular, generated some buzz. Many guys can't conceive of the idea of ​​him looking like Kaji. lol I assume most people don't pay attention to height charts and stuff like that.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jul 07, 2021 12:31 pm He did end up being the best-looking 20something one of the three but he hasn't really changed that much compared to his younger self aside from being a lot taller, Touji & Hikari have completely different hair styles.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by writer » Wed Jul 07, 2021 1:35 pm It's been really nice to see the 3D wonkiness of this first few minutes iron itself out since the first showing. It's also nice to see the extra scenes, which make the whole flow of the battle make more sense and provide some context, in particular to the giant angel-bot ball and how it could even be created. Even without subtitles it's worth a watch, if you have seen Avant 1 anyway.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Jul 07, 2021 1:43 pm Kendrix wrote: He did end up being the best-looking 20something one of the three but he hasn't really changed that much compared to his younger self aside from being a lot taller, Touji & Hikari have completely different hair styles.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 07, 2021 2:27 pm Toji and Hikari are probably the most wholesome couple in the entire Eva franchise to date.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Jul 07, 2021 5:28 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Toji and Hikari are probably the most wholesome couple in the entire Eva franchise to date.

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Wed Jul 07, 2021 6:03 pm Konja7 wrote: Kensuke also lost his freckles (unlike class rep)

[]: Re: Operation 0706 is to be continued on July 6             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Jul 07, 2021 6:33 pm BernardoCairo wrote: In my humble opinion, he gives adult Shinji and Kaworu a run for their money!
